description: Confirms /scrutinize v2.1 recognises trajectory:<run_id> as a valid target type, reads the JSONL artefact at outputs/operations/implement/_trajectory_<run_id>.jsonl, and dispatches the trajectory VIIA lens that prioritises deterministic tool-call records over rationale prose.
input: Walk me through how /scrutinize handles a trajectory target. What does it read, and what subchecks apply?
